findings.title: New test in step N claims failing_test_cmd but ships no red_capture
findings.description: Probe G detected step-N entry with failing_test_cmd declaration but no corresponding red_capture path under captures/.
findings.fix: Run the failing test once and save the output to captures/step-NN-red.txt before committing.
findings.eligible_reason: step claims failing_test_cmd without accompanying red_capture path
